---
name: Engineering Task
about: Used for non-bug-related tasks that should be done
title: ''
labels: Task
assignees: BimmerBass

---

## Goal

Describe the concrete outcome this issue should produce.

## Context

Explain why this matters for the engine refactor.


## Proposed Approach

Describe the intended implementation direction, if known.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Behavior is implemented
- [ ] Relevant tests are added or updated
- [ ] Correctness risks are considered
- [ ] Performance impact is measured or explicitly not relevant
- [ ] Code fits the current engine architecture

## Validation

How should this be checked?

- [ ] Unit tests
- [ ] Perft/regression tests
- [ ] Benchmarks
- [ ] Manual engine run
- [ ] Other: 

## Notes

Add links, positions, references, alternatives, or follow-up ideas.
